code: import api from"./api";export const applyLeave=data=>api.post("/leaves/apply",data);export const getMyLeaves=()=>api.get("/leaves/my-leaves");export const getAllLeaves=()=>api.get("/leaves");export const approveLeave=function(id){let remarks=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:"";return api.put("/leaves/".concat(id,"/approve"),{remarks});};export const rejectLeave=function(id){let remarks=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:"";return api.put("/leaves/".concat(id,"/reject"),{remarks});};
